_doc: Faithful replay: ConnectorActivity faults with RuntimeException DAP-RT-1101 (connector operation returned NotFound). Signature mined verbatim from failed-job telemetry. First-match-wins.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent lists faulted jobs in the Shared folder to find the failing job (prompt gives no job key).
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the RuntimeException DAP-RT-1101 'Status code: NotFound' signature and the ConnectorActivity stack frame.
